title: Set the Sybase Packet Size
text: Set the Sybase Packet Size n the application assignment file, set the tds_packetsize option. For example: USYS$SYB_PARAMS tds_packetsize 1024 Copy Use sp_configure to change the following settings: For example: maximum network packet size —must be set to a value which is a multiple of 512. additional netmem —must be at least three times the maximum network packet size. sp_configure "maximum network packet size", 2048 sp_configure "additional netmem", 6144 Copy Run the RECONFIGURE program to commit the new settings. Restart the SQL server. Related Links tds_packetsize Set the Sybase packet size. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
